query: VHS tape distortion glitch tracking error scanlines
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / analog_degradation: VHS scanlines, tracking errors, pixel grid distortion

response.objective_caption: A person wearing a light blue polo shirt and glasses leans forward through the screen of an RCA CRT television set. The television displays a background of large, brightly colored geometric shapes in pink, yellow, green, and blue. The gray television bezel features a small lightning bolt graphic on the lower front, along with control buttons and a speaker grille. The scene is set against a dark background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person wearing a light blue polo shirt and glasses emerges from the screen of an RCA CRT television set in a surreal composition. The television displays a background of aggressively clashing neon geometric blocks in pink, yellow, green, and blue with visible color banding. The gray television bezel features a small lightning bolt graphic on the lower front, along with control buttons and a speaker grille. The scene is overlaid with VHS-style analog degradation including scanlines, tracking errors, and noisy artifacts across the dark background, creating a lo-fi retro aesthetic.
